ddl.value: "left_on" IS NULL OR "joined_on" IS NULL OR "joined_on" <= "left_on"

ddl.value: "left_on" IS NULL OR "joined_on" IS NULL OR "joined_on" <= "left_on"

ddl.value: "end_date" IS NULL OR "start_date" IS NULL OR "start_date" <= "end_date"
